transcription.text: Rex Marshall here for Humble Oil & Refining Company, America's leading energy company. And this is Butyl, a miracle rubber so superior to natural rubber in withstanding shock, weather, and aging, it's finding countless new uses. Every American car built today has vital parts made of it. Created by scientists of Humble research, Butyl is typical of the way Humble uses the most advanced techniques, including atomic science, to work wonders with oil, to create amazing new products and improve existing ones. Another example is this unusual device to road test gasolines and lubricants. Using electronic recorders, eight robot-controlled cars can be made to travel over identical roads without budging a foot. By this and countless other research, Humble keeps its happy motoring promise to you of better products, better values, better service, and more. Yours from Humble.
